command:
capture_remediation() {
  mkdir -p 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening'
  {
    echo '# Remediation Notes (auto-captured from failed audit)'
    echo ''
    echo '## Quality Gate'
    cat .fabro-work/quality.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(not found)'
    echo ''
    echo '## Verification Findings'
    cat .fabro-work/verification.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(not found)'
    echo ''
    echo '## Deep Review Findings'
    cat .fabro-work/deep-review-findings.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(not found)'
    echo ''
    echo '## Promotion Decision'
    cat .fabro-work/promotion.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(not found)'
  } > 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/remediation.md'
}
if ! ( test -f 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/implementation.md' && test -f 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/verification.md' && test -f 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/quality.md' && test -f 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md' && test -f 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/integration.md' && grep -Eq '^merge_ready: yes$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^manual_proof_pending: no$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^reason: .+$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^next_action: .+$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^completeness: ([6-9]|10)$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^correctness: ([6-9]|10)$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^convention: ([6-9]|10)$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^test_quality: ([6-9]|10)$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && \
        grep -Eq '^layout_invariants_complete: yes$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && \
        grep -Eq '^slice_decomposition_respected: yes$' outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/promotion.md && ( _mb=$(git merge-base HEAD origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo origin/main); test "$(git diff --name-only "$_mb"..HEAD -- '*.rs' '*.toml' '*.py' '*.js' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.go' '*.java' '*.rb' '*.yaml' '*.yml' '*.json' '*.sol' '*.sh' | wc -l)" -gt 0 ) && grep -Eq '^quality_ready: yes$' 'outputs/test-coverage-critical-paths-ci-preservation-and-hardening/quality.md' ); then
  capture_remediation
  exit 1
fi
